sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Named One of the Most Trustworthy Companies in America by Newsweek for Fourth Consecutive Year
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. has been recognized by Newsweek as one of the Most Trustworthy Companies in America for the fourth consecutive year, ranking second in the real estate and housing category. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to integrity and its unique business model as a pioneer in life science real estate. The award is based on an extensive survey of U.S. residents evaluating trust across customer, investor, and employee touchpoints.

feed.title: J.M. Smucker Co Stock: A Steady Consumer Staples Play with Diversified Brands and Long-Term Growth Potential for North American Investors
feed.summary: J.M. Smucker Co (SJM) is highlighted as a resilient consumer staples company with a diversified portfolio spanning coffee, consumer foods, and pet foods, making it an attractive long-term investment for North American investors. The analysis details its business model, strategic initiatives, competitive strengths, and financial health, emphasizing its brand loyalty and consistent dividend growth. Key risks such as commodity price swings and intense competition are also addressed, alongside factors investors should monitor for sustained growth.

feed.title: Seagate Shares Rise 3% After Key Trading Signal
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ: STX) saw its shares rise over 3% following a "Power Inflow" signal on April 2nd at 10:27 AM EST. This proprietary TradePulse signal, which identifies strong shifts towards buying activity from both retail and institutional traders, triggered when STX was priced at $415.81 and led to an intraday high of $428.52 by 2:00 PM EST. The article highlights the effectiveness of real-time order flow analytics for identifying bullish momentum and potential intraday gains.

feed.title: Verizon (VZ) director Bertolini receives 5,062 phantom stock units in deferred plan
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. director Mark T. Bertolini was granted 5,062 phantom stock units as part of a deferred compensation plan. These units are the economic equivalent of one share of common stock and will be settled in cash upon Bertolini's termination of service as a director, bringing his total deferred phantom stock balance to 66,759 units after this award and dividend reinvestment. This transaction is classified as a compensation grant rather than a market purchase or sale of common stock.

feed.title: [Form 4] VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Roxanne S. Austin, a director at Verizon Communications, received a grant of 5,062 phantom stock units through a deferred compensation plan. These units are cash-settled and become payable upon her departure from the board, bringing her total holdings in the plan to 36,492 phantom stock units. This transaction is considered an indirect, compensation-related acquisition rather than an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb and Gilead Sciences are putting their media accounts into review
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb and Gilead Sciences have initiated a review of their respective media accounts. This development was reported by Ad Age, indicating both major pharmaceutical companies are evaluating their media partnerships. The article notes the date and time of this announcement.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands Stock: Integrated Resorts Leader with Strong Asia Focus Amid Evolving Global Gaming
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands is highlighted as a premier operator of integrated resorts, primarily focused on high-growth Asian markets like Macao and Singapore, offering investors exposure to global tourism recovery. The article details its diversified revenue model beyond traditional gaming, strategic expansions, and strong market positioning. While analysts see potential upside, the company faces risks such as regulatory changes and geopolitical tensions in its key regions.

feed.title: MetLife Inc. stock: Stable insurance giant with strong analyst upside potential amid sector recovery
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. (NYSE: MET) is presented as a resilient choice for North American investors in the life insurance and annuities sector, offering a moderate buy consensus and over 20% upside potential. The company's diversified operations across various segments and geographies, coupled with strong financial health and strategic initiatives, position it well for growth. Investors are advised to monitor interest rate fluctuations, regulatory changes, and competitive pressures, while benefiting from the stock's defensive qualities and income generation.

feed.title: Banner Corp (BANR) EVP granted stock units and withholds shares for taxes
feed.summary: Kenneth A. Larsen, Executive VP of Banner Bank (BANR), has been granted 1,324 restricted stock units vesting over three years and 1,986 performance-based restricted stock units tied to future goals. Additionally, he relinquished 219 shares to cover tax obligations on previous restricted stock awards. Following these transactions, Larsen directly owns 25,281 shares of Banner Corp common stock.

feed.title: ShinyHunters Hackers Claim Theft of 3M+ Cisco Records, Threaten Public Leak
feed.summary: The ShinyHunters hacking group claims to have stolen over 3 million Cisco records via Salesforce and AWS, issuing a "final warning" with a deadline of April 3, 2026, before threatening a public leak. The group alleges access to personally identifiable information, GitHub repositories, AWS storage buckets, and internal corporate data. Cisco has been contacted for comment, and the article will be updated upon their response.

feed.title: UBS Group Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Axalta Coating Systems (NYSE:AXTA) Stock Price
feed.summary: UBS Group lowered its price target for Axalta Coating Systems (NYSE:AXTA) from $36 to $31 while maintaining a "neutral" rating, indicating a potential 15.26% upside. This adjustment follows Axalta's slight miss on Q4 earnings and revenue expectations, coupled with softer Q1 guidance. The consensus among analysts remains a "Hold" with an average price target of $36.13, despite shares trading near $26.90.

feed.title: Southern Company (SO) director Meador awarded 786 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Southern Company director David E. Meador was granted 786.569 deferred stock units as quarterly board compensation, valued at $96.94 per unit. These units, awarded under the Southern Company 2021 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan, defer into the Deferred Compensation Plan for Outside Directors and will convert to common stock shares after his board service ends. This transaction increases his total deferred stock unit holdings to 9,279.6828 units, including those from dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Director John M. Turner Jr. at Southern Co (SO) awarded deferred stock units
feed.summary: Southern Company director John M. Turner Jr. was granted 786.569 deferred stock units as part of his quarterly compensation retainer. These units, valued at $96.94 each, increase his total holdings to 2,593.4454 deferred stock units. The units are settled in Southern Company common stock after his board service ends and include additional units from dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Southern Company (SO) director earns new deferred stock unit grant as Board retainer
feed.summary: Southern Company director David J. Grain received a grant of 838.1473 deferred stock units as part of his director compensation. These units, valued at $96.94 each, were awarded under the company's 2021 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan and deferred into the Deferred Compensation Plan for Outside Directors. Following this grant and dividend reinvestment, Grain now holds a total of 85,316.8599 deferred stock units, which will convert to Southern Company common stock after his Board service ends.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) Price Target Lowered to $16.00 at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) from $20.00 to $16.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating, following mixed Q3 results where revenue slightly beat estimates but EPS missed. Other analysts have also adjusted price targets downwards, contributing to a "Reduce" consensus rating and an average target of $16.27 for Conagra, which is currently trading near its 52-week low with a dividend yield nearing 9%. The company faces challenges from margin pressure and divestiture impacts, leading to narrowed and lowered full-year guidance.

feed.title: Southern Company (SO) director awarded new deferred stock units as equity pay
feed.summary: Southern Company director James Donald M was granted 464.2047 deferred stock units, valued at $96.94 per unit, as part of his quarterly equity retainer under the company's 2021 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan. These units, which represent the right to receive one share of common stock each, will be settled in shares after his service on the Board concludes. Following this grant and dividend reinvestment, Donald M now holds a total of 203,293.2031 deferred stock units.

feed.title: Smucker’s Jam Jar Refresh Puts Long Term Brand And Valuation In Focus
feed.summary: J. M. Smucker has launched its first major packaging redesign in nearly 30 years for its fruit spreads, aiming to modernize the brand while retaining its iconic gingham pattern. This refresh is expected to strengthen recognition and consumer interest at the shelf, which is crucial for long-term brand health given the company's recent stock declines. Investors are advised to watch how this redesign impacts shelf space, retailer commentary, and volume trends, while also considering the company's debt and future cash generation.

feed.title: UBS Group Cuts PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) Price Target to $110.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has reduced its price target for PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) to $110.00 from $122.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating. This adjustment comes after PPG reported mixed quarterly results, missing EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations. The article also notes insider selling despite significant institutional buying and provides a summary of other analysts' ratings and financial performance data for PPG.

feed.title: Why Biohaven (BHVN) Is Up 11.7% After Fully Enrolling Its Phase 2 Obesity Drug Trial
feed.summary: Biohaven (BHVN) saw its stock rise by 11.7% after announcing the completion of enrollment for its Phase 2 obesity drug trial of taldefgrobep alfa. This drug is notable for its potential to reduce fat while increasing lean muscle mass, with topline data expected in the second half of 2026. The full enrollment is a positive catalyst for the company, although Biohaven still faces challenges related to its loss-making status and funding needs.

feed.title: SPG (SPG) CAO Rulli has shares withheld for taxes on restricted stock
feed.summary: Simon Property Group Inc.'s Chief Administrative Officer, John Rulli, reported a routine tax-related disposition where 1,156 shares of common stock were withheld to cover tax obligations on restricted stock vesting on April 1, 2026. The shares were withheld at a price of $186.53 per share. After this transaction, Rulli directly holds 37,487 shares and indirectly holds 2,028 shares through a 401(k) plan, including 24 shares acquired via the company's dividend reinvestment plan.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley’s defensive playbook for spiking oil prices amid Iran war
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley is advising investors to adopt a defensive strategy for their portfolios due to uncertainties surrounding the Iran war and its impact on oil prices. The firm has downgraded global equities to equal weight and is recommending an increased allocation to cash and government bonds. This shift is in response to surging oil prices and the potential for greater geopolitical risk to negatively affect earnings and market multiples.

feed.title: American Express to expand premium lounge at DFW Airport
feed.summary: American Express is expanding its Centurion Lounge at DFW Airport, making it approximately 50% larger. The expansion will introduce more dining and seating areas, a walk-up ice cream window, and a second full-service bar to enhance the premium lounge experience for travelers.

feed.title: Union Pacific Guarantees Post-Merger Jobs to American Trade Dispatchers Union
feed.summary: This article briefly reports on Union Pacific's guarantee of post-merger jobs to the American Trade Dispatchers Union. It also includes information on Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, noting a 35% revenue increase year-over-year to $609 million and a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share. The content implies that the full report from WSJ requires logging in.

feed.title: U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission Approves License Renewal Application for Extended Operations of Diablo Canyon
feed.summary: The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) has approved Pacific Gas and Electric Company's 20-year license renewal for the Diablo Canyon Power Plant, ensuring its continued operation to provide clean energy to millions of Californians. This approval follows a three-year review process and aligns with state mandates to keep the plant running beyond its original planned retirement to ensure grid reliability and meet growing energy demand. Diablo Canyon is California's largest source of clean energy, contributing significantly to the state's decarbonization efforts and providing substantial annual financial benefits from avoided greenhouse gas emissions.

feed.title: RSU grant boosts Atmus (NYSE: ATMU) CEO Disher’s equity stake
feed.summary: Atmus Filtration Technologies' CEO, Stephanie Disher, was granted 31,492 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of the company's 2026 long-term incentive program. These RSUs will vest in three equal tranches starting March 1, 2027, increasing her direct holdings to 388,676 shares of common stock. This grant is a form of compensation aimed at aligning executive interests with shareholder value.

feed.title: SPG (SPG) assistant general counsel granted restricted stock, shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Simon Property Group Inc.'s assistant general counsel, Kevin M. Kelly, received an award of 1,361 shares of restricted stock. To cover tax withholding obligations upon vesting, 478 shares were withheld at a price of $186.53 per share. After these transactions, Kelly holds 22,731 shares directly and 104 shares indirectly through a 401(k) plan.

feed.title: Atmus (NYSE: ATMU) CFO receives 5,163 RSUs in 2026 stock grant
feed.summary: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc. (NYSE: ATMU) Chief Financial Officer Jack Kienzler was granted 5,163 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of the company's 2026 long-term incentive program. These RSUs were awarded at no cash cost and will vest in three equal tranches starting March 1, 2027, converting into shares of Atmus common stock. Following this grant, Kienzler now holds a total of 80,936 shares of Atmus common stock directly.

feed.title: $40M compensation breakdown for IP execs
feed.summary: International Paper's top six executives collectively received $40 million in compensation for fiscal year 2025. This total included one executive who left the company after only four months, highlighting significant executive payouts despite short tenures. The Memphis-based company's executive compensation is detailed in this report by the Memphis Business Journal.

feed.title: Simon Property (NYSE: SPG) SVP granted stock; shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Matthew A. Jackson, SVP and assistant treasurer of Simon Property Group (NYSE: SPG), was granted 1,361 shares of restricted common stock under the company's 2019 Stock Incentive Plan. To cover tax obligations upon vesting, 447 shares were withheld at a price of $186.53 per share in a non-market transaction. Following these transactions, Jackson directly holds 9,255 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Plant serving 4 million Californians gets 20-year federal renewal
feed.summary: The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) has approved a 20-year license renewal for Pacific Gas and Electric Company's (PG&E) Diablo Canyon Power Plant. This plant provides nearly 20% of California's clean energy and serves about 4 million Californians. While the renewal allows extended operations, any operation beyond 2030 will require further action from the California Legislature.

feed.title: Great American Insurance Group Announces the Promotion of Jesse F. Gutierrez to Divisional President, Professional Liability
feed.summary: Great American Insurance Group has promoted Jesse F. Gutierrez to Divisional President, Professional Liability, effective April 27, 2026. He will succeed Reina L. Gregorio, who is retiring in July. Mr. Gutierrez joined the company in 2013 and has extensive leadership experience within the Professional Liability division.

feed.title: SPG (NYSE: SPG) EVP awarded restricted stock and has shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Donald G. Frey, EVP and Treasurer of Simon Property Group (SPG), was awarded 2,721 shares of restricted common stock on April 1, 2026. Concurrently, 1,312 shares were withheld at $186.53 each to cover tax obligations related to the vesting of restricted stock. Following these transactions, Frey directly holds 22,573 common shares and indirectly holds 196 shares in a 401(k) plan.

feed.title: Simon Property Group (NYSE: SPG) counsel reports 1,048-share tax withholding
feed.summary: Steven E. Fivel, General Counsel for Simon Property Group (NYSE: SPG), reported a tax-related share disposition rather than an open-market trade. On April 1, 2026, 1,048 shares of common stock were withheld at $186.53 per share to cover tax obligations from vesting restricted stock. After this transaction, Fivel directly owns 40,986 shares and indirectly holds an additional 383 shares through his spouse.

feed.title: SPG (SPG) CEO Eli Simon has 2,030 shares withheld for taxes on vesting
feed.summary: Eli Simon, CEO of Simon Property Group Inc. (SPG), reported a routine tax-related disposition where 2,030 shares of common stock were withheld to cover tax obligations upon the vesting of restricted stock. The shares were valued at $186.53 each. Following this transaction, Simon directly holds 56,455 shares of SPG common stock.

feed.title: IRGC attacks Dubai Oracle data center, US fighter jets at Jordan's Al Azraq base
feed.summary: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) attacked an Oracle data center in Dubai and US fighter jets at Jordan's Al Azraq base on Thursday. These incidents, along with attacks on a US diplomatic facility near Baghdad Airport and an Amazon cloud computing center in Bahrain, were reported as retaliation for earlier attacks on Iran. Bahrain's Foreign Minister is seeking a UN Security Council vote on a resolution to protect commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz amidst rising regional tensions.

feed.title: AMN Healthcare Services, DaVita, Bristol-Myers Squibb, Novavax, and AbbVie Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of several healthcare and pharmaceutical companies, including AMN Healthcare Services, DaVita, Bristol-Myers Squibb, Novavax, and AbbVie, plummeted following reports that the U.S. might impose up to 100% tariffs on imported branded and patented drugs. This potential move, targeting companies not negotiating lower drug prices, caused a significant sell-off in the sector. Novavax's shares were particularly volatile, though the market's reaction suggests the news is meaningful but not fundamentally business-altering.

feed.title: Roper Technologies (NASDAQ:ROP) Could Be A Buy For Its Upcoming Dividend
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (NASDAQ:ROP) is set to pay a dividend of US$0.91 per share, with the ex-dividend date around April 6th, and a strong track record of dividend growth. The company demonstrates excellent dividend sustainability, with payout ratios of just 24% of profit and 15% of free cash flow, alongside robust earnings per share growth of 18% per annum over the past five years. This financial health suggests Roper Technologies is a promising dividend stock due to its reinvestment focus and consistent dividend increases.

feed.title: Packaging Corp. of America to lay off 110 tied to Chesterfield facility
feed.summary: Packaging Corp. of America (PCA) is set to lay off 110 employees with the closure of its Chesterfield County converting operation, with most job terminations expected by early June. The company cited a "difficult business decision" and plans to offer support, including assistance with transfers to other PCA locations. This follows other closures and layoffs reported in late 2025 across various PCA facilities.

feed.title: GDIT to lay off 95 employees across two offices in Montgomery County
feed.summary: General Dynamics IT (GDIT) is set to lay off 95 employees across two offices in Montgomery County, marking the company's second round of layoffs in recent months. GDIT is a prominent federal contractor in the Greater Washington region. This news follows a tumultuous year for several companies in the area, including Capital One and Amazon, which have also announced significant job cuts.

feed.title: Crown Castle Inc Stock (CCI) Moved Up by 7.14% on Apr 2: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. (CCI) stock rose by 7.14% following the announcement of a comprehensive restructuring plan. This plan includes divesting small cell and fiber operations, a $7.00 billion debt reduction, and a $1.00 billion share buyback, aiming to create a more focused tower business and bolster investor confidence. Despite previous concerns about organic growth and valuation, these strategic initiatives are seen as positive catalysts for the company's financial future.

feed.title: Vegas hotel bundle from $200 adds meals, drinks, High Roller
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment has launched an "Inclusive Summer Package" for Harrah's Las Vegas, The LINQ Hotel, and Flamingo Las Vegas, starting at $200 per night. The package includes accommodations, taxes, resort fees, two meals daily, bottomless drinks, High Roller Observation Wheel tickets, and free self-parking. This initiative aims to provide value options for travelers visiting the Las Vegas Strip from April through August 2026.

feed.title: General Motors (GM): One of the Most Undervalued Value Stocks to Buy Right Now
feed.summary: General Motors Company (NYSE: GM) is considered one of the most undervalued value stocks, with 66% of analysts maintaining bullish ratings and a consensus price target implying a 36.52% upside. The company plans to increase production of heavy-duty Silverado and Sierra trucks due to strong demand for their gas-powered truck franchise, despite rising gasoline prices. While GM is seen as a promising investment, the article suggests that some AI stocks may offer even higher and quicker returns.

feed.title: Gartner, Inc. (IT) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT). The lawsuit, with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 18, 2026, alleges that Gartner made materially misleading statements between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, concerning its ability to meet consulting revenue targets and maintain its CV growth rate. Shareholders who suffered losses are encouraged to come forward to potentially lead the lawsuit.

feed.title: Is Your Town on the List? Customers in Hundreds of Minnesota Communities Getting Electricity Refunds
feed.summary: Hundreds of Minnesota communities are set to receive electricity refunds this month, stemming from the 2022 Inflation Reduction Act and lower fuel costs. Xcel Energy customers in 612 Minnesota communities will see a direct reduction in their electric bills, with an average household receiving $2.46 off their monthly bill for nine months, plus an additional $1.11 monthly due to lower fuel costs. The article provides a comprehensive list of qualifying communities.

feed.title: Hims & Hers Health, Regeneron, Biogen, BioMarin Pharmaceutical, and Moderna Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Hims & Hers Health, Regeneron, Biogen, BioMarin Pharmaceutical, and Moderna fell after reports suggested the U.S. might impose up to 100% tariffs on imported branded and patented drugs. This potential move targets pharmaceutical companies that have not agreed to lower drug prices in the United States, prompting a significant sell-off in the sector. The article notes that stock market overreactions can create buying opportunities for high-quality stocks.

feed.title: [Form 4] HUNT J B TRANSPORT SERVICES INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Shelley Simpson, President and CEO of HUNT J B TRANSPORT SERVICES INC (JBHT), reported stock activity related to compensation. A performance-based restricted stock unit award partially vested on March 31, 2026, resulting in 3,954 RSUs converting to common stock, while 1,456 RSUs were forfeited. Additionally, 1,754 common shares were withheld to cover tax obligations, and Simpson now holds 83,623 common shares directly, along with other direct and indirect holdings.

feed.title: Refinancing 2027 Debt Maturities Could Be A Game Changer For Brookdale Senior Living (BKD)
feed.summary: Brookdale Senior Living (BKD) recently refinanced $185 million of debt maturing in March 2027 with new Freddie Mac-backed mortgages at 5.38% fixed rate, extending maturities to April 2033. This move reduces near-term refinancing pressures, allowing management to focus on improving operations and occupancy. While it eases balance sheet risk, the company's investment narrative still hinges on sustained occupancy gains driving better margins and cash flow to overcome persistent net losses and high debt.

feed.title: [Form 4] HUNT J B TRANSPORT SERVICES INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: H.B. Hunt Transport Services Chairman John N. Roberts settled a performance-based Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) award, converting 7,316 RSUs into common shares and forfeiting 2,693 RSUs due to partial vesting. To cover tax obligations, 172 common shares were withheld. Following these transactions, Roberts directly holds 335,241 shares of common stock, in addition to shares in a 401(k) account.

feed.title: AI Investing Insights - Official Homepage - Intellectia AI™
feed.summary: This page from Intellectia AI provides real-time ETF data for BDVL, including its price, percentage change, and after-market figures. It highlights Intellectia AI as a "Most Trusted AI Platform for Winning Trades" and offers various AI-powered tools and market analysis resources. The page indicates that detailed holdings, composition, and bond ratings data for the BDVL ETF are currently unavailable.

feed.title: Banner Corp (BANR) EVP gets RSU grants and uses shares for taxes
feed.summary: Janet M. Brown, EVP of Banner Bank, reported receiving three grants of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) under the 2023 Omnibus Incentive Plan, totaling 7,052 shares, with vesting periods tied to performance and time. She also used 333 shares from previously vested awards to cover tax obligations. These transactions reflect compensation activity rather than open-market trading.
